title: gymnogramma rutifolia
intro: Gymnogramma rutifolia, also known as the Rough-leaved Gymnogramma, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma rutifolia include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Gymnogramma rutifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
